eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Medina, TX; at 5:21 AM on JUN 20, 2026 Effective until 5:21 AM JUN 21, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Medina County is monitoring conditions and coordinating with the State for flooding. Tune to local weather or the National Weather Service www.weather.gov for weather conditions. Turn Around, Do Not Drown!
